name: Black Pepper and Walnut Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dark brown sugar; pack firm
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Butter and flour two baking sheets.
3. Beat the eggs and oil together in a large bowl.
4. Add the sugar, nutmeg, and pepper, and beat until well combined.
5. Combine the flour and baking soda; add to the egg-sugar mixture gradually.
6. Fold in the chopped toasted walnuts (fairly stiff but sticky).
7. Divide the dough into four equal parts.
8. On a floured board or work surface, form each piece into a rope about 12 inches long and 2 to 3 inches wide.
9. Place the ropes on the prepared baking sheets.
10. Flatten the top of each loaf slightly with fingertips.
11. Bake for 30 minutes.
12. Remove from oven and allow to cool on racks for 10 minutes.
13. Slice each loaf into slices about 1/2 inch thick.
14. Place the slices on the baking sheets, cut-side down, and return to oven for about 20 minutes.
15. Turn the biscotti after 10 minutes.
16. Cool on racks and store in air-tight tins or jars.
